replies.msg:
有網民譯咗Credit: Tracy Cheng
It goes without saying that the incident of the discovery of explosive in Tsuen Wan district is yet another cliche tactics used by the HKPF. It’s a publicity stunt not targeting our fellow Hong Kongers, which is made obvious when the press conference was all of a sudden conducted by a native English speaker.

What’s curious about the incident is how strongly the HKPF emphasizes that the explosive is TATP and was detonated early at 7am this morning, leaving only charred residue on the wall.

What’s TATP？

It’s nicknamed mother of Satan, which is the culprit of various terriorist attacks like those in London, Sri Lanka and Paris. It’s frequently associated with extremist terrorist groups by western media. The explosive, being highly versatile, explodes powerfully with the rapid expansion of gases without the process of burning or the production of flames.

200g of TATP is enough to destroy a whole plane. Did you claim you detonated 1kg on the roof without even breaking a window?

By the way, the second detonation happened at the rear staircase.

#I_have_nothing_to_say

721港島見。

四、徹底追究警隊濫權情況
五、以行政命令解散立法會，立即實行雙真普選

Regarding the so called “explosives” found in a warehouse in Tsuen Wan, educated Hong Kong people must have recognised this as, yet, an employed strategy the Hong Kong Police used to frame the protesters. The orchestration of the finding of the “explosives” is clearly a show to manipulate the World to believe the protesters are truly what they have always claimed, thugs and rioters. The evidence being that a police officer with foreign background held the press conference instead of a high-ranked local police officer. There must be an ulterior motive in this incident – smear and discredit the protesters.

A point to note, the Hong Kong Police stressed that they had seized the explosives, Triacetone triperoxide (hereinafter called TATP) and detonated them on the rooftop of the building where the explosives were found this morning at 7 am. The wall is blackened and smoked on the rooftop. Hong Kong National Front said in a strong tone that they have no plan for creating any kind of explosives and that they do not know where did the explosives come from. If the Hong Kong National Front is saying the truth, then the police must be lying and planted the evidence into the warehouse.

WHAT IS TATP?
TATP is the evil himself. It is responsible for multiples bombing in London, Sri Lanka, and Paris. It touches the nerve of international media when mentioned because the explosives correlate people’s minds to terrorism.
TATP is highly unstable. It has a characteristic of not creating any inflammation and flame and burning when exploded, and, it uses the theory of rapid expansion of gases to create substantial damages.

200g of TATP is enough to blow up an entire airplane. Yet, the police claimed they had detonated 1kg of TATP on a rooftop with the damage of only a blackened wall, not even a window is shattered due to the induced detonation performed this morning.

Regarding the so called “explosives” found in a warehouse in Tsuen Wan, educated Hong Kong people must have recognised this as, yet, an employed strategy the Hong Kong Police used to frame the protesters. The orchestration of the finding of the “explosives” is clearly a show to manipulate the World to believe the protesters are truly what they have always claimed, thugs and rioters. The evidence being that a police officer with foreign background held the press conference instead of a high-ranked local police officer. There must be an ulterior motive in this incident – smear and discredit the protesters.

A point to note, the Hong Kong Police stressed that they had seized the explosives, Triacetone triperoxide (hereinafter called TATP) and detonated them on the rooftop of the building where the explosives were found this morning at 7 am. The wall is blackened and smoked on the rooftop. Hong Kong National Front said in a strong tone that they have no plan for creating any kind of explosives and that they do not know where did the explosives come from. If the Hong Kong National Front is saying the truth, then the police must be lying and planted the evidence into the warehouse.

TATP與其他炸藥不同之處，在於引爆後，並不會發生燃燒反應，而是它的分子向四周急劇崩散。在不到一秒鐘內，僅幾百克的TATP就可產生成百上千公升氣體。這種非常規炸藥的特性，與汽車上的安全氣囊非常類似。別小覷這些氣體，因為在機艙內，氣壓如超過上限2%足以爆開玻璃窗，超過上限10%更足以令客機空中解體。

replies.msg:
全名是三過氧化三丙酮（Triacetone triperoxide）的TATP，首次在19世紀末由德國化學家製成。說它容易製作，指的是其原料可輕易在市面購得，包括丙酮（acetone）、含氧水（oxygenated water）和硫（sulfuric）、鹽酸（hydrochloric acid）或硝酸（nitric acid）。我們常用的洗甲水就是丙酮，含氧水則常見於消毒劑。
